name: Centraid
description: Mounts /centraid on the gateway. Each registered app is a folder with static assets, a sqlite database, and JS handlers for queries / actions / cron-fed ingest.

appsDir.description: Absolute or plugin-root-relative path where app folders live. Defaults to 'centraid' under the plugin root.

gatewayBaseUrl.description: Loopback URL used to point cron webhooks back at the gateway. Must resolve to 127.0.0.1.

versionRetention.description: Maximum number of versions to retain per uploaded app (active version always kept). Minimum 2.
